name: personal-configs
description: Claude Code plugins for AI-assisted development workflows

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Unified TDD implementation and hypothesis-driven debugging workflows with 12 agents, 18 commands, and automatic context preservation

plugins.name: playwright
plugins.description: Browser automation with Playwright - test pages, fill forms, take screenshots, validate UX, and automate any browser task

plugins.name: claude-session-feedback
plugins.description: Tools for exporting conversation history, reading past sessions, and getting feedback on Claude Code usage

plugins.name: infrastructure-as-code
plugins.description: Terraform and AWS infrastructure management with safety-first practices

plugins.name: ralph-loop
plugins.description: Implementation of the Ralph Wiggum technique - continuous self-referential AI loops for interactive iterative development. Run Claude in a while-true loop with the same prompt until task completion.

plugins.name: claude-md-best-practices
plugins.description: Guide for writing and maintaining effective CLAUDE.md files

plugins.name: autonomous-workflow
plugins.description: DEPRECATED — replaced by research-report and long-horizon-impl plugins

plugins.name: research-report
plugins.description: Autonomous iterative deep research producing a LaTeX report with synthesis, parallel subagents, and strategy rotation

plugins.name: long-horizon-impl
plugins.description: Long-running autonomous research, planning, and TDD implementation workflows with LaTeX output, parallel subagents, anti-slop escalation, and multi-day execution

plugins.name: notify
plugins.description: Terminal bell and macOS banner notifications when Claude Code needs input or finishes responding
